notes: Section, , , required the President to take such measures as may be necessary to prevent the importation of ermine, fox, kolinsky, marten, mink, muskrat, and weasel furs and skins which are the product of the Union of Soviet Socialist Republics or of Communist China.act June 16, 1951, ch. 141, § 1165 Stat. 75
